SC 2.1.2 — No Keyboard Trap

# Verdict Confidence Element Rationale
1 FAIL high

Element location

(page-level — no single trap selector identified)

Element source

Trap type: focus_lost_after_dismiss
Tabs pressed: 15 / 237 focusable on page, 3 unique selector(s) visited
 The cookie banner was successfully dismissed, but keyboard focus became trapped cycling only through banner-related buttons (3 unique selectors out of 237 total focusable elements). After dismissal, Tab navigation failed to reach any page content outside the banner, indicating focus was lost and keyboard users cannot access the main page functionality.

SC 2.4.4 — Link Purpose (In Context)

# Verdict Confidence Element Rationale
1 PASS high

Element location

a[href="https://boldcommerce.com/privacy"]

Element source

<a href="https://boldcommerce.com/privacy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" title="Bold's privacy policy">Bold</a>
 The link has a title attribute ('Bold's privacy policy') that clarifies its purpose, and the href destination (https://boldcommerce.com/privacy) confirms it leads to a privacy policy. While the accessible name 'Bold' alone is generic, the title attribute provides sufficient context to determine the link purpose is to access Bold's privacy policy.

Element location

a[href="https://codepen.io/pro/privacy"]

Element source

<a href="https://codepen.io/pro/privacy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" title="Codepen's privacy policy">Codepen</a>
 The link has a title attribute ('Codepen's privacy policy') that clarifies its purpose, and the href URL path (/pro/privacy) confirms it leads to a privacy policy. The accessible name 'Codepen' combined with the title attribute makes the link purpose clear—to access Codepen's privacy policy.

Element location

a[href="https://legal.hubspot.com/privacy-policy"]

Element source

 The link text 'HubSpot' alone does not clearly indicate the link's purpose. SC 3.1.2 — Language of Parts

# Verdict Confidence Element Rationale
1 PASS high

Element location

div#CookieBannerNotice

Element source

<div id="CookieBannerNotice" lang="en" dir="ltr" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="CookieBannerTitle" aria-describedby="CookieBannerDescription" aria-modal="true" tabindex="-1" ng-non-bindable=""><div class="cookiebanner__main"><div class="cookiebanner__main__inner"><div class="cookiebanner__main__cont
 The declared lang='en' attribute matches the text content, which is clearly English. The cookie banner text contains standard English phrases ('This website uses cookies', 'We use cookies to personalise content and ads', 'Deny', 'Allow all', 'Show details', 'Necessary cookies help make a website usable') with no apparent language mismatch. The en attribute is appropriate for English content.
2 PASS high

Element location

div#CookieBanner

Element source

<div id="CookieBanner" data-version="1.1.0" data-template="generaxion/cookiebot-accessible-template" data-tone="optimized" name="CookieBanner" style="display: flex;" class="is-visible-cookie-banner is-closing-cookie-banner"><div id="CookieBannerOverlay" aria-hidden="true"></div><div id="CookieBanner
 The text content is entirely in English, matching the page primary language en-us. All substantive phrases, clauses, and sentences ('This website uses cookies', 'We use cookies to personalise content and ads', 'Necessary cookies help make a website usable') are in English. No foreign-language content requiring annotation is present.
3 PASS high

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Accessibility requires ownership,
The text is entirely in English, matching the page primary language en-us. All content—including the company name 'Vispero' and the descriptive phrases about accessibility services—is in English. There is no foreign-language content present, so no [lang] annotation is required.
4 PASS high

Element location

div.elementor-element

Element source

<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-60b7649 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="60b7649" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Built and tested by people who are
